'''''Star Wars: Infinity's End''''' was the fifth story arc in ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]''. It takes place three months after [[Star Wars: Twilight|''Twilight'']].<ref name="Star Wars: The Comics Companion" />

It was one of the only Star Wars: Republic story arcs to remain uncollected (in addition to ''[[Star Wars: The Devaronian Version]]''), until its inclusion in ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Quinlan Vos: Jedi in Darkness]]''.
